title: Chewy Romantic Garlic Uruguayan Stir-fry
description: This whole30-friendly and cream of tartar infused dish is perfect for a romantic dinner. It combines the umami richness of garlic with the depth of cream of tartar, creating a hearty and flavorful meal.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup heavy whipping cream
ingredients.amount: to taste, based on personal preference for flavor intensity

ingredients.name: 1/2 pound beef tenderloin or chicken breast

instructions: Prepare the beef or chicken by seasoning with salt and pepper on both sides.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Add oil and sear the meat until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side for the tenderloin and 4-5 minutes for chicken breasts.
Remove from heat and set aside. In the same pan, add minced garlic and sauté for an additional minute until fragrant but not burnt.
Pour in red wine vinegar if using, then slowly pour in cream of tartar while continuously whisking to prevent burning. Simmer for 2-3 minutes or until slightly thickened.
Return the seasoned meat back into the skillet and stir-fry gently over low-medium heat for another 5-7 minutes, allowing it to absorb the sauce evenly.
Transfer the dish to a warm plate and let rest for a minute before serving. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
